title: Operations Executive (24/7 Shift)
description:
About Us

AsiaNext is an institution-only, global exchange for digital assets. A first-of-its-kind, combining the innovation of crypto with the robust security of traditional finance, we offer a comprehensive platform for trading and tokenising a diverse range of securities and non-bankable assets. Our services include listing, trading, clearing, settlement, and custody.

A joint venture between SBI Digital Asset Holdings Co., Ltd. (SBI DAH) and SIX Group AG (SIX), AsiaNext is built to meet the growing demand from institutional investors for a safe venue to trade digital assets. Where applicable, our business activities will be subject to the strict regulatory oversight of the Monetary Authority of Singapore, and we adhere to the highest standards of corporate governance and internal controls across all activities.

Leveraging the extensive networks of SBI DAH and SDX between Asia and Europe, as well as their joint expertise, we have built AsiaNext since 2020. Our vision is to become a trusted, market-leading exchange whose members can safely trade a wide variety of digital assets, permitting greater institutional access and driving the new era of digital finance worldwide.

Why Join Us?

With SIX, the Swiss stock exchange, and Japan’s finance conglomerate SBI DAH as joint shareholders, AsiaNext has significant financial backing. The team at AsiaNext are seasoned professionals from the finance industry and are passionate about digital assets, innovation and excellence. We listen to one another; we learn together, and we collaborate with a diverse ecosystem.

Join AsiaNext and be part of a dynamic, fast-growing team with opportunities for professional growth and development. You'll have the chance to work on cutting-edge projects that are shaping the future of finance

About This Role:

AsiaNext seeks to develop a fair, orderly and transparent exchange that facilitates members and participants to have equal access to market information and transparent trading rules.

This role will be performed on shift work basis where the candidate will be primarily tasked to monitor the continuous smooth running of the platform processes, hourly settlement run, and work on the market surveillance role in monitoring, identifying and escalating instances of market abuse or misconduct and other manipulative practices that compromise the fair, orderly and transparent exchange operations of the trading platform.

Responsibilities

  • Act as the first line of client support on Member’s account or trade related queries.
  • Monitor platform processes and ensure the system batch run is executed successfully for the hourly settlement run covering critical process such as MTM margin calculation and risk limit notification.
  • Activate contingent procedure to mitigate any system or data feed outage that affect the system batch run and hourly margin computation.
  • Monitor member’s cash balance and margin limit position and follow up with Members proactively to manage their margin call if it is triggered.
  • Monitor member’s credit or concentration limit and follow up with Members to manage their risk limit exposure if it is breached.
  • Escalation to Ops management on any major operation process, system run or data feed failure for coordinated and prompt resolution.
  • Perform level 1 check on market surveillance alerts triggered and forward to Ops Management for level 2 review on alert closure or further escalation if the alert event affects the working of a fair, efficient and transparent market.
  • Use Python, R, and SQL to extract data, perform simple analysis, and generate a basic report. Able to use MIS/monitoring tools such as PowerBi, Zabbix, Graffana etc.
  • Prior experience of conducting user acceptance testing (either manual or automated)

Qualifications And Experience

Education

  • Diploma in banking and finance, business management/Higher NITEC in business.

Experience and Skill

  • Prior experience working in a related role in the banking/securities services/fintech/payment industry will be desirable.
  • Good knowledge of relevant regulatory and market conduct rules and other related regulations will be preferred.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
  • Proven analytical and eye for details
  • Collaborative, self-discipline, and team focus
  • Ability to pick up the learning with the training provided and work in a fast-paced environment
  • Willing to work in different shifts to cover the 24x7 operations

Rotate on fortnightly basis:-

Time:

7.30am to 7.30pm (Day Shift)

7.30pm to 7.30am (Night Shift)

Employment Benefits

  • Competitive staff benefits - annual leave, life insurance, and medical insurance (includes dependents)

postedCompany.description:
AsiaNext is a trusted digital exchange for institutional investors in Asia and globally. It will offer integrated listing, trading, and post-trade services for digital assets, including digital payment tokens. This joint venture between SBI Digital Asset Holdings Co., Ltd. (SBI DAH) and SIX Group AG (SIX) will provide an institutional-grade platform to enable the tokenization and trading of existing securities and non-bankable assets.

AsiaNext will support the growing institutional demand for trading of public and private digital assets. It will leverage the extensive networks of SBI DAH in Asia and SIX in Switzerland and Europe, as well as their joint expertise in fulfilling institutional investors’ needs. Both SBI DAH and SIX have demonstrated leadership in digital asset markets globally through multiple investments, issuances and initiatives in this space.
postedCompany.name: ASIA DIGITAL EXCHANGE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
